questionHtml:
What is a community?

A. A group of individuals of the same species in a given area

B. A group of animals that interact socially

C. A group of organisms interacting with the abiotic environment

D. A group of populations interacting with each other within a given area

meta.title: What is a community? A. A group of individuals of the same species in a given area B. A group of animals that interact socially C. A group of organisms interacting with the abiotic
breadcrumbLabels: C4.1.10. A community as all of the interacting organisms in an ecosystem
